title: Day 18 end — sett-3-stabilize-v3 Day 04
content: Sprint 3 Day 04 COMPLETE. Closes Day 17 P1 gap #1 (hook integration). DashboardShell integrates useDashboardData with 4-state rendering (disabled/loading/error/ready) preserving Day 10 backward-compat. Commit: 742ce9d feat(dashboard). Test 12210 CoV 3/3 PASS deterministic (+9 vs Day 17). Build PASS. Benchmark 4.12/10 delta -0.02 honest noise. Engine 0 diff. PZ v3 0 violations. Self-score 7.625/10 (+0.375 vs Day 17). MCP calls 10 (7 claude-mem + 2 context7 + 1 serena active). Gap P1: Edge Function scaffold only + route mount pending. Gap P2: MCP 10/15 target + coverage n/a + E2E carry-over. Next Day 19 (sett-3 Day 05): Edge Function real query OR DashboardShell route mount OR E2E WelcomePage fix.
